The anxiety comes from worries about an upcoming event or unresolved issues , which seem to linger in the back of my mind and affect my daily routine . At the same time , there ' s a sense of hope that counterbalances this anxiety , giving me a glimmer of positivity and a belief in a better outcome . Overall , it’s a complex interplay between worry and optimism that shapes how I approach things .
